intro.title: About LunarByte_Zero
intro.description: LunarByte_Zero is an innovative music player designed for music enthusiasts. We are committed to providing the purest, highest-quality music experience, allowing every note to touch your soul. Using the latest audio processing technology to present unparalleled sound quality.

features.hd_audio_desc: Supports lossless audio formats, restoring the most authentic sound
features.cross_platform_desc: Seamlessly sync your music library across all devices
features.custom_ui_desc: Rich themes and appearance customization options

team.title: Development Team
team.description: We are a passionate cross-national development team dedicated to creating excellent music software.

download.title: Download LunarByte_Zero
download.subtitle: Choose your platform to start your music journey

opensource.title: Open Source Details
opensource.subtitle: We believe in the power of open source
opensource.description: Parts of LunarByte_Zero's core technology have been open-sourced. We welcome developers worldwide to contribute and jointly promote the development of music technology.
opensource.contribute_desc: We use GitHub for code hosting and collaboration. Welcome to submit Issues and Pull Requests.
